    - Option B: Overlapping circles (offset centers). Incorrect centering.
    - Option C: Single circle. This would be $1 \times 1$, not $1 \times 2$.
    - Option D: Concentric circles. This represents two circles with the same center. This fits the "superposition" model perfectly.
